title: 1996 Census | Stats NZ
content:
Find data, reports, and information about methods used for the 1996 Census.
New Zealand's 1996 Census of Population and Dwellings was held on 5 March 1996.
Census topic page provides the latest data, news, and information about the Census of Population and Dwellings.
